(11 comments)

Hi Renu, some fancy testing going on on this. Cant have been easy, well done.
Overall looks good I have some small issues as comment but most importantly i wont run in my environment ?!

I wont give -1 a I am out next week and dont want to block you. I assume it can be sorted and I need other to confirm this. I also want to check code coverage if I could run the tets to make sur nothing significant is missed (I don't expect so, your test look exhaustive :-D)

Patch Set 15:

> Patch Set 15: Code-Review-1
> 
> When the update node api is invoked, the entire data node is not being published. Only the child data nodes are being published to kafka.
> 
> API Used: 
> curl -X PATCH "http://localhost:8080/cps/api/v1/dataspaces/E2EDemo/anchors/bookstore/nodes?xpath=%2F" -H "accept: application/json" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"bookstore\":{\"bookstore-name\":\"ChapterNew\"}}"
> 
> published content: 
> 
> {
>     "code": "02",
>     "name": "kids",
>     "books": [
>         {
>             "lang": "en",
>             "price": {
>                 "value": 699
>             },
>             "title": "The Golden Compass",
>             "authors": [
>                 "Philip Pullman"
>             ],
>             "pub_year": {
>                 "value": 1995
>             }
>         }
>     ]
> }

The issue is in FragmentRepository and a separate ticket has been opened to track it. https://jira.onap.org/browse/CPS-479
